Description: Project Manager — overall QC oversight and coordination
SourceSection: Phase A Step A2 and Phase C
Notes: PM oversight across QC Plan approval, conformance determination, CCC support; hours from Level_of_Effort.csv R-01

Description: Construction Project Manager — construction-phase QC coordination and field management
Notes: CPM field coordination of QC activities during construction; hours from Level_of_Effort.csv R-02

Description: Site Superintendent — field inspection coordination and trade oversight
Notes: On-site inspection support, trade coordination for hold-point inspections, subcontractor QC oversight; hours from Level_of_Effort.csv R-03

Description: Cost Estimator — QC cost benchmarking and estimate support
Notes: QC Plan costing support and benchmarking for proposal prep (5% evaluation weighting); hours from Level_of_Effort.csv R-08

Description: QA/QC Lead — QC program development and inspection execution
SourceSection: Phase A Step A2 and Phase B Steps B3-B10
Notes: QC Plan drafting, inspection execution, deficiency tracking, self-assessment; hours from Level_of_Effort.csv R-06

Description: HSE Manager — QC/safety interface and program alignment
Notes: QC Plan alignment with OH&S Program (DEL-019-01), safety-QC interface coordination; hours from Level_of_Effort.csv R-05

Description: QC Plan development (written document per REQ-QC-01)
Notes: Written QC Plan covering 8-point minimum content list, severity classification, KPIs, approval chain, conformance determination process; labour included in ITEM-019-04-005 and ITEM-019-04-001

Description: Inspection Schedule development aligned with construction phases
Notes: Phased inspection schedule with hold points for all significant construction activities; labour included in ITEM-019-04-005

Description: Deficiency Tracking System establishment
Notes: Deficiency log/register with severity classification (critical/major/minor), status tracking, and differentiated response timelines; labour included in ITEM-019-04-005

Description: Testing Protocol Documents development
Notes: Documented testing protocols per material/system type with acceptance criteria and test method standard references; labour included in ITEM-019-04-005

Description: Standard Inspection Report Template creation
Notes: Standardized template for all inspection events including date, location, type, IFC reference, inspector, County attendance, findings, deficiencies; labour included in ITEM-019-04-005

Description: County representative inspection coordination (ongoing)
Notes: Notification scheduling (minimum 48-hr lead time recommended), attendance tracking, report distribution to County per RFP s3.3.2; labour included in ITEM-019-04-002 and ITEM-019-04-003

Description: Subcontractor QC oversight (ongoing)
Notes: Extension of QC inspection and sign-off rigor to all subcontractor work products; feeds DEL-019-03 performance evaluations; labour included in ITEM-019-04-003 and ITEM-019-04-005

Description: QC status reporting for weekly coordination meetings (ongoing)
Notes: Weekly QC status summary including open deficiencies by severity, upcoming inspections, test results, KPI performance for DEL-019-02 meeting agenda; labour included in ITEM-019-04-005 and ITEM-019-04-002

Description: Periodic QC Program self-assessment
Notes: Monthly internal self-assessment of QC program execution (inspection adherence, deficiency log completeness, County compliance, KPI performance); labour included in ITEM-019-04-005

Description: Inspection personnel competency verification
Notes: Competency verification for all inspection personnel before independent inspections; labour included in ITEM-019-04-001 and ITEM-019-04-005

Description: QC program onboarding for personnel and subcontractors
Notes: Orientation on QC procedures for new subcontractors and project team members; labour included in ITEM-019-04-005 and ITEM-019-04-003

Description: Third-party testing laboratory qualification (if applicable)
Notes: Verification of ISO 17025 or equivalent accreditation for third-party labs; labour included in ITEM-019-04-005; applicability TBD pending IFC specs

Description: Final punch-list inspection and conformance determination
Notes: Pre-CCC final inspection, zero-deficiency verification, formal conformance determination; labour included in ITEM-019-04-001 and ITEM-019-04-005

Description: QC record retention and CCC documentation support
Notes: Assembly and archival of complete QC documentation package for Owner CCC review; digital backup for guarantee period (construction + 2 years); labour included in ITEM-019-04-001 and ITEM-019-04-005
